entity.summary: United States-origin centralized digital-asset exchange founded in 2020 for institutional and individual investors.
entity.notes: Current exchange-directory data preserves the CrossTower identity, official domain, United States origin, and 2020 founding year, but reports untracked volume and no reserve data. The first-party platform could not be independently inspected during this review, so HEI uses limited and live_unverified rather than active.

evidence.title: CrossTower official exchange domain
evidence.notes: Dedicated first-party domain is preserved by the current exchange profile, but the trading interface was not independently verified in this review.

evidence.title: CrossTower exchange profile
evidence.notes: Profile identifies CrossTower as a United States-based centralized exchange founded in 2020 and currently lists it with untracked volume and unavailable reserve data.
